svg.text: IPCW weight distribution and positivity diagnostics
MIMIC-IV clone-censor-weight analysis; final stabilized IPCW among strategy-adherent cloned observations.
Final IPCW weight distribution by strategy
ESS as percentage of cloned observations
Maximum percentage within arm across imputations
Abbreviations: CCW, clone-censor-weight; ESS, effective sample size; IPCW, inverse probability of censoring weighting.
Tail percentages and percentiles are summarized across the 5 imputed datasets; no final IPCW exceeded 10 and the maximum observed weight was 5.97.
